# Proto CI (`ci-proto.yml`)

**Triggers**: `merge_group`, `pull_request`, `push`, `workflow_dispatch`

```mermaid
graph TD
    classDef gate fill:#4a9eff,stroke:#2563eb,color:#fff
    classDef plumbing fill:#a78bfa,stroke:#7c3aed,color:#fff
    classDef test fill:#34d399,stroke:#059669,color:#fff
    classDef collation fill:#fbbf24,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
    classDef sideeffect fill:#f87171,stroke:#dc2626,color:#fff

    changes{{"Determine need to run proto checks"}}
    breaking["Check for breaking changes"]
    lint["Lint proto definitions"]
    python-codegen["Check Python proto stubs are up to date"]
    proto_checks[["Proto Checks Pass"]]

    changes -->|proto| breaking
    changes -->|proto| lint
    changes -->|proto| python-codegen
    breaking --> proto_checks
    changes --> proto_checks
    lint --> proto_checks
    python-codegen --> proto_checks

    class changes gate
    class breaking test
    class lint test
    class python-codegen test
    class proto_checks collation
```

## Legend

| Shape        | Color  | Meaning                   |
| ------------ | ------ | ------------------------- |
| Hexagon      | Blue   | Gate / change detection   |
| Stadium      | Purple | Plumbing / matrix builder |
| Rectangle    | Green  | Test / core work          |
| Subroutine   | Yellow | Collation / status gate   |
| Rounded rect | Red    | Side effect / snapshots   |

Edge labels show the change-detection output that gates the job.

## Job details

| Job              | Depends on                              | Condition                              | Matrix |
| ---------------- | --------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- | ------ |
| `changes`        | -                                       | github.repository == 'PostHog/posthog' | -      |
| `breaking`       | changes                                 | proto                                  | -      |
| `lint`           | changes                                 | proto                                  | -      |
| `python-codegen` | changes                                 | proto                                  | -      |
| `proto_checks`   | changes, lint, breaking, python-codegen | -                                      | -      |
